items.title: ECO 2026: indirect comparison favours Wegovy pill over Foundayo
items.summary: At ECO 2026, findings from a post-hoc indirect treatment comparison of Wegovy versus Foundayo, oral GLP-1RAs approved in the US for chronic weight management.

items.title: Nonprofits join forces to debut marketplace for shelved CGTs
items.summary: OTXL’s COO, Beth White, notes that the CGT marketplace could revitalise programmes that would otherwise have been indefinitely put on ice.

items.title: ECO 2026: tirzepatide shows potential for T1D treatment
items.summary: During ECO 2026, a study was presented analysing the use of tirzepatide, a dual GIP and GLP-1 agonist, in treating type 1 diabetes (T1D).

items.title: Arna Pharma and Slate Run complete JV for new US company
items.summary: Arna Pharma and Slate Run Pharmaceuticals have completed a JV to form a company focusing on branded products and 505(b)(2) medicines.

items.title: Biopharma industry endorses Pazdur for FDA commissioner role
items.summary: Hundreds of biopharma leaders say Dr Richard Pazdur has the necessary qualities to lead the FDA amid a crisis of confidence.
